message:
bd sync: 2026-01-16 20:04 - Added 10 new beads with dependencies

New beads for automation and agent ergonomics:
- remote_compilation_helper-bcl: CI workflow for cross-platform testing
- remote_compilation_helper-9zy: Self-Update with GitHub Releases
- remote_compilation_helper-eke: Enhanced install.sh with Gum UI
- remote_compilation_helper-xi5: Agent Detection epic
- remote_compilation_helper-0dl: Idempotent first-run detection
- remote_compilation_helper-srd: Environment variable overrides
- remote_compilation_helper-brr: Fleet Worker Deployment
- remote_compilation_helper-gr7: Observability with Prometheus
- remote_compilation_helper-upg: Architecture documentation
- remote_compilation_helper-lgy: TUI dashboard with ratatui
